paper_title: Measuring Coding Challenge Competence With APPS
evaluation_method: Test case execution. Generated Python code is executed against a bank of over 130,000 test cases. Strict accuracy requires passing ALL test cases for a problem. The paper also tracks test case average (fraction of test cases passed per problem). Problems span three difficulty levels: Introductory, Interview, and Competition. BLEU was shown to be inversely correlated with functional correctness, so test pass rate is the primary metric.
metric: strict accuracy (pass all test cases) and test case average
